Follow only these instructions when contributing to the Requirements Workflow solution.

## Rules

### 1. Project Scaffolding

> **Purpose:**  
> Describe the process and requirements for creating and registering new projects within the Requirements Workflow
> solution. Specify naming conventions, folder structure, and any initial setup steps.

- `[PROJECT_SCAFFOLDING_RULES]`

---

### 2. Database Integration

> **Purpose:**  
> Explain how to integrate databases into the solution, including configuration steps, connection string management, and
> best practices for security and scalability.

- `[DATABASE_INTEGRATION_RULES]`

#### 2.1 Official Documentation Gathering

> **Purpose:**  
> Outline the approach for finding, referencing, and utilizing official documentation when working with databases or
> other components. Emphasize the importance of using authoritative sources.

- `[DOCUMENTATION_GATHERING_RULES]`

---

### 3. Existing Project Modification

> **Purpose:**  
> Provide guidelines for modifying existing code, configuration files, and service contracts. Include instructions for
> maintaining backward compatibility and documenting changes.

- `[EXISTING_PROJECT_MODIFICATION_RULES]`

---

### 4. Data Flow Updates

> **Purpose:**  
> Describe the process for updating data flow between services, including changes to APIs, message formats, and
> integration points.

- `[DATA_FLOW_UPDATE_RULES]`

#### 4.1 Analyze and Update Affected Services

> **Purpose:**  
> Explain how to identify services impacted by data flow changes and the steps required to update, test, and validate
> those services.

- `[DATA_FLOW_UPDATE_RULES]`

---

### Tool Integration

> **Purpose:**  
> List and highlight the available tools integrated within the Requirements Workflow solution. Document each tool’s
> purpose and usage for team visibility and process improvement.
